zh.lifeSummary: 當Marie de Ponthieu, Countess of Montreuil於1199年4月17日出生在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利奧馬爾時，她的父親William IV Count of Ponthieu33歲，母親Alais de France38歲。她於大約1212年與Simon de Dammartin在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利奧馬爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1250年9月16日在法國i萊-德-福朗斯艾頌享年51歲，埋葬在法國皮卡迪索姆阿古勒斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marie de Ponthieu, Countess of Montreuil于1199年4月17日出生在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利奧馬爾时，她的父亲William IV Count of Ponthieu33岁，母亲Alais de France38岁。她于大约1212年与Simon de Dammartin在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利奧馬爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1250年9月16日在法国i萊-德-福朗斯艾頌享年51岁，埋葬在法国皮卡迪索姆阿古勒斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ponthieu,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Pontier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Francisco, Mercedes, Osvaldo, Ramon, Roberto.  French Jean-Pierre, Pierre.
French and Dutch: occupational name for a toll keeper on a bridge, from an agent derivative of pont ‘bridge’. This surname is also found in the Dominican Republic.
History: The first recorded bearer of the surname Pontier in the US was Lewis Pontier, born in MD in the 1800s. His origins are not known.

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

en.lifeSummary: When Marie de Ponthieu, Countess of Montreuil was born on 17 April 1199, in Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France, her father, William IV Count of Ponthieu, was 33 and her mother, Alais de France, was 38. She married Simon de Dammartin about 1212, in Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 7 daughters. She died on 16 September 1250, in Essonne, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 51, and was buried in Argoules, Somme, Picardie, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marie de Ponthieu, Countess of Montreuil est née le 17 avril 1199, à Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France, son père, William IV Count of Ponthieu, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Alais de France, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Simon de Dammartin environ 1212, à Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 16 septembre 1250, à Essonne, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterrée à Argoules, Somme, Picardie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marie de Ponthieu, Countess of Montreuil am 17. April 1199 in Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William IV Count of Ponthieu 33 und ihre Mutter Alais de France 38. Sie hat um 1212 in Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich Simon de Dammartin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 16. September 1250 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Essonne, Île-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Argoules, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marie de Ponthieu, Countess of Montreuil è nata il il 17 aprile 1199 nel Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, sua padre, William IV Count of Ponthieu, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Alais de France, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Simon de Dammartin circa 1212, nel Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 7 figlie. Morì il 16 settembre 1250, nel Essonne, Île-de-France, Francia, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolta a Argoules, Somme, Picardie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Marie de Ponthieu, Countess of Montreuilが1199年4月17日にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメアウマルで生まれた時，父William IV Count of Ponthieuは33歳，母Alais de Franceは38歳であった。約1212年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメアウマルでSimon de Dammartinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1250年9月16日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスエソンで51歳で死去し，フランスピカーディソンメアルゴウレスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marie de Ponthieu, Countess of Montreuil(이)가 1199년 4월 17일 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 오마일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William IV Count of Ponthieu(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alais de France(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 대략 1212년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 오마일에서 Simon de Dammartin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1250년 9월 16일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 에손에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 피카디 솜 아굴스에 묻혔다.

mn.17 April 1199–16 September 1250: 1199 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 17–1250 оны Есдүгээр сарын 16

pt.17 April 1199–16 September 1250: 17 de abril de 1199–16 de setembro de 1250
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marie de Ponthieu, Countess of Montreuil nasceu em 17 de abril de 1199, em Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França, seu pai, William IV Count of Ponthieu, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Alais de France, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Simon de Dammartin aproximadamente 1212, em Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 16 de setembro de 1250, em Essonne, Île-de-France, França, com 51 anos, e foi sepultada em Argoules, Somme, Picardie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marie de Ponthieu, Countess of Montreuil родилась 17 апреля 1199 г. в местности аумеил, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени William IV Count of Ponthieu было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Alais de France, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Simon de Dammartin около 1212 г. в местности аумеил, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 16 сентября 1250 г. в местности эссонн, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 51 год и была похоронена в местности аргоулесь, сомм, пикарди, Франция.

es.17 April 1199–16 September 1250: 17 de abril de 1199–16 de septiembre de 1250
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marie de Ponthieu, Countess of Montreuil nació el 17 de abril de 1199, en Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, su papá, William IV Count of Ponthieu, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Alais de France, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Simon de Dammartin aproximadamente 1212, en Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 7 hijas. Murió el 16 de septiembre de 1250, en Essonne, Île-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultada en Argoules, Somme, Picardie, Francia.
